Package net.finmath.finitedifference.grids

package net.finmath.finitedifference.grids
Package net.finmath.finitedifference.grids.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    net.finmath.finitedifference
    Package net.finmath.finitedifference.
    net.finmath.finitedifference.boundaries
    Package net.finmath.finitedifference.boundaries.

    net.finmath.finitedifference.utilities

  • Class
    Description
    AbstractGrid
    Abstract base class for implementations of Grid.
    BarrierAlignedSpotGridFactory
    Utility factory for spot grids used in barrier option PDE problems.
    ExponentialGrid
    Non-uniform exponential grid between minimumValue and maximumValue.
    GaussianGrid
    Non-uniform grid based on the Gaussian (normal) distribution between minimumValue and maximumValue.
    Grid
    Interface representing a spatial grid used in finite difference methods.
    GridWithMandatoryPoint
    Piecewise-uniform grid on [minimumValue, maximumValue] with one mandatory interior node.
    HyperbolicSineGrid
    Non-uniform grid based on a hyperbolic sine transformation between minimumValue and maximumValue.
    SpaceTimeDiscretization
    Encapsulates the space-time discretization used in a finite difference scheme.
    UniformGrid
    Implementation of the Grid interface representing a uniform spatial grid.
